name: tax_lookup
description: Look up tax refunds for a customer by their name. On first call, may return address_verification with street_options (a list of street names for the caller to identify). Call the tool again with customer_address set to their chosen street to verify. Returns verification_failed if wrong. On success, returns a JSON object with 'refunds' (array of records) and 'portal_url'. Returns disambiguation_needed if multiple people share the name. Returns a no-match message string if no refunds are found.

customer_name.description: The customer's name to search for refunds. Can be a full name, first name only, or business name.

customer_address.description: Optional. The customer's address to disambiguate when multiple people share the same name. Only provide this when the tool previously returned disambiguation_needed.

name: transfer_to_agent
description: Transfer the caller to a live human agent. Call this tool when the caller asks to speak with a person, representative, or agent, or when you cannot resolve their issue. This sets the transfer flag so the contact flow routes to the live agent queue.

contact_id.description: The contactId from the current session

instance_id.description: The instanceId from the current session

name: send_sms
description: Send an SMS text message to a US phone number. Use this to send refund claim links to voice callers who cannot click links. Only send when the caller confirms they want to receive a text.

phone_number.description: US phone number in E.164 format (e.g. +12125551234)

message.description: The SMS message body to send (max 160 characters)
